# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

<!-- generated by git-cliff -->

## [v2.16.1] - 2026-04-08

### Bug Fixes

- *(settings)* Save button now closes modal and shows errors inline (#105)

### Miscellaneous

- Update changelog for v2.16.1

## [v2.16.0] - 2026-04-08

### Features

- *(frontend)* Handle streaming scan-batch events with rAF flush
- *(app)* Add PreloadThumbnailsForPhotos to avoid re-scanning
- *(app)* Stream scan results in batches of 50
- *(scanner)* Add ScanDirectoryStream for incremental batch scanning

### Bug Fixes

- *(ci)* Pin Go 1.25.9 to resolve 5 stdlib vulnerabilities (CVE fixes in crypto/x509, crypto/tls, archive/tar, html/template)
- *(ci)* Add toolchain go1.25.9 to resolve stdlib vulnerabilities

### Miscellaneous

- Add coverage for thumbnail helpers and changelog edge cases
- *(app)* Extract thumbnail prep helpers with full test coverage
- Add coverage for PreloadThumbnailsForPhotos and ScanDirectoryStream
- *(deps-dev)* Bump vite
- *(deps)* Bump modernc.org/sqlite from 1.48.0 to 1.48.1

## [v2.15.0] - 2026-04-06

### Features

- *(frontend)* Add AI progress modal, weight sliders, sub-score display, and sort/filter
- *(app)* Rewrite AI methods with worker pool and plugin architecture
- *(storage)* Add sub-score columns and scoring_plugins table for AI pipeline
- *(scoring)* Add agglomerative face clustering with cosine similarity
- *(scoring)* Add pipeline orchestrator with parallel stage execution
- *(scoring)* Add NIMA aesthetic quality plugin with ImageNet normalization
- *(scoring)* Add ArcFace face embedder plugin with L2-normalized 512D embeddings
- *(scoring)* Add SCRFD face detector plugin with NMS
- *(scoring)* Add bulk model registration and download to ModelManager
- *(scoring)* Add sharpness plugin with normalized Laplacian scoring
- *(scoring)* Add user-configurable score weights with normalization
- *(scoring)* Add plugin registry with category-based lookup

### Bug Fixes

- *(ai)* Address code review findings — 13 bug fixes

### Documentation

- Update README and CLAUDE.md with AI scoring documentation

### Miscellaneous

- *(scoring)* Add coverage tests for CI threshold
- *(scoring)* Add coverage tests for CI threshold
- *(scoring)* Remove dead code — old engine, providers, and greedy clustering
- *(scoring)* Rewrite provider.go with plugin architecture types

## [v2.14.8] - 2026-04-05

### Bug Fixes

- *(ai)* Save scores for all photos and guard double Startup

## [v2.14.7] - 2026-04-05

### Bug Fixes

- *(scoring)* Handle 3D tensor shape and no-confidence output format

## [v2.14.6] - 2026-04-05

### Bug Fixes

- *(scoring)* Handle single-output BlazeFace model format

## [v2.14.5] - 2026-04-05

### Bug Fixes

- *(ai)* Fix 12 bugs in AI analysis pipeline

## [v2.14.4] - 2026-04-05

### Bug Fixes

- *(ui)* Fix AI enabled state not persisting to sidebar after Settings save

## [v2.14.3] - 2026-04-05

### Bug Fixes

- *(ui)* Fix Settings save, Download button, sidebar layout, and add menu bar

### Miscellaneous

- *(scoring)* Add ONNX runtime provisioner tests for coverage threshold

## [v2.14.1] - 2026-04-05

### Features

- *(scoring)* Add CloudProvider with OpenAI Vision API integration
- *(dedupe)* Integrate AI face scores into quality ranking
- *(app)* Wire scoring engine into App with full AI analysis pipeline
- *(scoring)* Add Laplacian variance sharpness scoring for eye regions
- *(scoring)* Add LocalProvider with BlazeFace ONNX face detection
- *(scoring)* Add ModelManager for ONNX model download and caching
- *(scoring)* Add ScoringProvider interface and Engine orchestrator
- *(ui)* Integrate AIPanel into App layout with events and keyboard shortcut
- *(ui)* Add AI settings section and sidebar analyze button
- *(ui)* Add face bounding box overlay to Viewer
- *(ui)* Add AIPanel component with 4 collapsible sections
- *(ui)* Add AI face count badge and score bar to grid thumbnails
- *(app)* Add Wails-bound methods for AI scoring, face clusters, and settings
- *(ui)* Add AIPanel stylesheet
- *(storage)* Add AI scoring, face detection, and face cluster tables
- *(scoring)* Add face embedding clustering with cosine similarity
- Open app maximized with minimum window dimensions

### Bug Fixes

- *(scoring)* Auto-provision ONNX Runtime and make Settings clickable
- *(scoring)* Add Windows build tag for ONNX local provider

## [v2.13.0] - 2026-04-03

### Bug Fixes

- *(app)* Update config test to respect CPU-based worker cap
- *(device)* Add binary validation and timeouts for system tools
- *(heic)* Add context timeouts to sips and FFmpeg HEIC conversion
- *(video)* Add context timeouts to all FFmpeg/FFprobe exec calls
- *(image)* Add per-item timeout and context to GenerateBatch
- *(app)* Cap ThumbnailWorkers at runtime.NumCPU()

### Performance

- *(raw)* Add sync.Pool for preview extraction buffers

### Miscellaneous

- Add .worktrees/ to .gitignore

## [v2.12.0] - 2026-04-03

### Bug Fixes

- *(storage)* Resolve gocritic filepath separator lint warning in test

### Performance

- *(storage)* Enable SQLite WAL mode, pragmas, and concurrent reads

## [v1.1.0] - 2026-03-18

### Features

- Auto-configure performance params from system probe, settings modal UI
- Implement video trimming functionality during export and expand test coverage for image, video, deduplication, and logging modules.

### Bug Fixes

- Address all code review findings from PR #6
- Settings layout, export reset, storage detection, media server shutdown
- Assign blobUrlRef before setImageSrc, clear debounce timer on unmount
- Video key prop, AbortController for images, debounced navigation, activePhotoPath state split
- Add Unwrap() to trackingWriter for ResponseController compatibility
- Add headers-sent guard to panicRecoveryMiddleware
- Resolve bugs, remove unused dependencies, and improve system metrics
- Harden media server — panic recovery, MIME types, semaphore, structured http.Server

### Documentation

- Add homebrew cask distribution instructions and definition

### Performance

- Virtualize photo grid with TanStack Virtual — cap DOM to ~52 nodes
- Background video duration enrichment via worker pool

## [v1.0.20] - 2026-03-12

### Features

- Shimmer loading animation on thumbnail cards until image loads
- Disk-based thumbnail cache for fast grid loading
- Auto-detect previous deduplication results
- Hybrid UI redesign — navy/violet palette, masonry grid, star ratings, EXIF panel

### Bug Fixes

- Move typescript/vite to dependencies and use explicit npx resolution
- Remove npx from build scripts to fix CI tsc resolution
- Replace column-count masonry with CSS Grid + rewrite FileLoader
- Remove LazyThumbnail wrapper that broke masonry layout + widen EXIF
- Thumbnails always visible + EXIF as aligned vertical card
- Missing thumbnails fallback + full-width frosted glass EXIF panel
- Light mode text visibility, column heights flush with titlebar
- Match mockup precisely — 3-col grid with wider panel, narrower sidebar, EXIF card, bigger stars

### Performance

- Lazy thumbnail loading, EXIF layout fix, clickable folder name

### Miscellaneous

- Update .gitignore and package-lock.json
- Code review cleanup + update README
